articles.summary: The top five models for the $1,000-plus payments were popular pickup trucks including the Ford F-150, Chevrolet Silverado 1500 and Ram 1500.

articles.title: A hotly debated lung cancer drug cut the risk of death by 34% in a late-stage trial in China
articles.summary: An experimental lung cancer drug from Akeso and Summit Therapeutics reduced the risk of death by 34% in a late-stage trial, according to data released Sunday.

articles.title: Disney is poised to ramp its already booming advertising business. Rita Ferro is behind the push
articles.summary: Disney is selling ads for the Super Bowl, Oscars and Grammys in 2027, all major advertising revenue drivers. Global ad president Rita Ferro is leading the charge.

articles.title: Investors and labels are buying into the growing South Asian music business in the U.S.
articles.summary: Warner Music Group, the third-largest music label by market share, is tapping into the South Asian music movement with its latest venture, 5 Junction.

articles.title: Will Gen Z be the generation to revive moviegoing?
articles.summary: Gen Zers like affordable, social experiences and are driving demand for anime and video game titles at the theaters.

articles.title: Retail had a 'surprisingly robust' first quarter, but the real test is ahead as tax refunds dry up
articles.summary: The retail industry saw strong first-quarter sales and profits, but high tax refunds and buy now, pay later helped mask underlying consumer weakness.

articles.title: Ten debiut może rozgrzać giełdę. Anthropic przygotowuje się do IPO
articles.summary: Anthropic, jedna z największych firm sektora sztucznej inteligencji w USA, poinformował o złożeniu w komisji papierów wartościowych (SEC) dokumentów związanych z planem wejścia na giełdę. Według "New York Times" pozyskane środki mogą zostać przeznaczone przede w

articles.title: Polska jak Korea Południowa? Ekonomista: Niemcy wciąż tego nie widzą
articles.summary: Niemcy nie wykorzystują w pełni potencjału współpracy z Polską, bo nie doceniają tempa rozwoju polskiej gospodarki – wynika z wypowiedzi prof. Marcina Piątkowskiego w wywiadzie dla "Frankfurter Allgemeine Zeitung".

articles.title: McDonald's unveils new global growth strategy to win over diners as competition rises
articles.summary: McDonald's new growth plan comes as inflation and high gas prices mean restaurants are competing for a smaller pool of customers.

articles.title: Barry Diller's People offers to buy casino giant MGM Resorts for $48.30 per share
articles.summary: Barry Diller's People Inc. extended an offer for MGM Resorts at $48.30 per share.

articles.title: UAW union strike threatens General Motors truck production
articles.summary: Nearly 1,000 workers at a Michigan supplier plant that notably makes parts for GM pickup trucks went on strike Monday after not reaching a new contract deal.

articles.title: Berkshire's bet on Taylor Morrison suggests the housing market may have bottomed
articles.summary: Analysts say the deal between Berkshire Hathaway and Taylor Morrison signals that the housing market may have bottomed.

articles.title: 'Disrupted or dead': AI is crushing a generation of startups built before ChatGPT
articles.summary: The AI boom that has funneled more than $250 billion into OpenAI and Anthropic has left hundreds of startups built before ChatGPT's arrival in 2022 stranded.

articles.title: Why Trump reversed course to fast-track psychedelic drugs for mental healthcare
articles.summary: President Donald Trump is trying to fast-track research into psychedelics as treatments, creating new opportunities and risks.

articles.title: Disney's ABC files early broadcast licenses renewal. FCC Chair vows to 'follow the facts'
articles.summary: Disney said it filed renewals for eight broadcast station licenses "under protest," after the FCC launched an early review years ahead of schedule.

articles.title: Replimune to resubmit twice-rejected drug for approval after FDA shakeup
articles.summary: Replimune was among the drugmakers that had criticized the FDA for what they called inconsistent guidance around trials and approvals.

articles.title: 'Our flavors are on the shelf': The evolution of Asian grocery beyond the 'ethnic aisle'
articles.summary: As interest in Asian flavors rises, mainstream grocery stores are incorporating more Asian groceries to work toward being a one-stop shop for all consumers.
